title: Legendary Roleplayzz 2
body:
In This Mod I added a  GigaAxo Spawn Egg
A Nerf gun with Ammo, Excalibur Armor and Sword.

You should download it if you like roleplay,fighting and the meme Giga Chad!

This mod is still in the Alpha and it will get updates very soon. Stay tuned!

Before you download it get Optifine because without it, it can lag alot.

That's it. Enjoy!
